where.if: AND (ol.target_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ol.target_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ol.new_value LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT ol.id, ol.user_id AS userId, ol.operation_type AS operationType, ol.target_type AS targetType, ol.target_id AS targetId, ol.old_value AS oldValue, ol.new_value AS newValue, ol.ip, ol.user_agent AS userAgent, ol.created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT au.username FROM admin_users au WHERE au.id = ol.user_id) AS operatorName FROM operation_logs ol
ORDER BY ol.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT ol.id, ol.user_id AS userId, ol.operation_type AS operationType, ol.target_type AS targetType, ol.target_id AS targetId, ol.old_value AS oldValue, ol.new_value AS newValue, ol.ip, ol.user_agent AS userAgent, ol.created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT au.username FROM admin_users au WHERE au.id = ol.user_id) AS operatorName FROM operation_logs ol
ORDER BY ol.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_logs (user_id, operation_type, target_type, target_id, old_value, new_value, ip, user_agent, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{operationType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{oldValue}, #{newValue}, #{ip}, #{userAgent}, NOW())
